gauge.name: City Creek near Salt Lake City

impacts.statement: major flooding will occur along North Temple near 2nd West and areas west. Additionally, 2nd South will receive major flooding in the form of ponding throughout the area.
moderate flooding will occur to areas near North Temple and 3rd and 4th West. Upwelling water will pond in these areas and move into regions near 2nd South.
minor flooding will occur to areas near North Temple and 4th West. Water will upwell from underground culverts along this area through manhole covers.
